  
 Test Summary

| Total Test Cases | Passed | Failed (Fixed) |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| 18 | 13 | 5 |

 

# Test Cases

## Authentication Tests

| Test Case | Input | Expected Result | Actual Result | Status |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Valid patient login | Correct email \+ password (Role: Patient) | Redirect to home, session set with Patient role | Redirect to home, session set correctly | PASS |
| Valid doctor login | Correct email \+ password (Role: Doctor) | Redirect to Doctor Dashboard | Redirect to Dashboard | PASS |
| Valid admin login | Correct email \+ password (Role: Admin) | Redirect to Admin panel | Redirect to Admin panel | PASS |
| Invalid password | Correct email, wrong password | Error message shown, stay on login | Error message shown | PASS |
| Empty fields | Empty email and password | Validation error shown | Validation error shown | PASS |
| Register new user | Name, email, password filled | New user created with Patient role | User created, redirected to login | PASS |
| Duplicate email registration | Email already in database | Error: email already exists | Error shown | PASS |

 

## Admin Panel Tests

| Test Case | Input | Expected Result | Actual Result | Status |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Access admin panel as Admin | Logged in as Admin | Admin Index page loads | Admin Index page loaded | PASS |
| Access admin panel as Patient | Logged in as Patient, visit /Admin/Index | Redirect to Login | Redirected to Login | PASS |
| View users list | Admin visits /Admin/Users | All users displayed in table | All users displayed | PASS |
| Add doctor \- valid data | Select user, enter specialization, availability, rating | Doctor added, redirect to Doctors list | Doctor added successfully | PASS |
| Add doctor \- no UserId | Submit form without selecting a user | Error: user does not exist | Originally crashed with DbUpdateException (FIXED) | PASS |
| Delete doctor | Click delete on existing doctor | Doctor removed from list | Doctor removed | PASS |

 

## Doctor Dashboard Tests

| Test Case | Input | Expected Result | Actual Result | Status |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Doctor views dashboard | Logged in as Doctor with appointments | Appointments listed with patient name, date, status | Originally showed empty list (FIXED — UserId/DoctorId mismatch) | PASS |
| Doctor with no appointments | Logged in as Doctor, no appointments booked | Empty dashboard with no errors | Empty dashboard shown | PASS |
| Non-doctor visits /Doctor/Dashboard | Logged in as Patient | Redirect to Login | Redirected to Login | PASS |

 

## Appointment Tests

| Test Case | Input | Expected Result | Actual Result | Status |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Patient books appointment | Select doctor, pick date/time | Appointment saved, confirmation shown | Appointment saved successfully | PASS |

# Bug Tracking

The following bugs were identified during development and testing. All listed bugs have been resolved.  
 

| Description | Severity | Status | Fix Applied |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Admin panel routes (Users, Doctors, AddDoctor, DeleteDoctor) had no role/auth check — accessible by any logged-in user | High | Fixed | Added IsAdmin() helper method and guard at the top of each action in AdminController.cs |
| Doctor Dashboard showed empty list for all doctors — Session UserId was being compared directly to DoctorId, but these are different ID values | High | Fixed | Dashboard now looks up the Doctor record by UserId first, then filters appointments by Doctor.Id |
| AddDoctor form crashed with DbUpdateException when submitted without selecting a user — UserId saved as 0, violating FK constraint | High | Fixed | Form now includes a user dropdown (SelectList via ViewBag). Controller validates UserId before saving. |
| ViewBag.Users was null when AddDoctor view re-rendered after a validation error — caused InvalidOperationException on the dropdown | Medium | Fixed | Added PopulateUsersDropdown() helper called in every code path that returns the AddDoctor view |
| DeleteDoctor had no null check — calling /Admin/DeleteDoctor with an invalid id caused a NullReferenceException | Medium | Fixed | Added null guard: if doctor \== null, redirect to Doctors list without throwing |
